basicDetails.implementingAgency: Department Of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government Of Meghalaya

schemeContent.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to provide training for enhancing the skills of farmers besides imparting updated agricultural technologies to departmental functionaries.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Integrated Agriculture Training Centre (IATC) Scheme” was launched by the Department of Agriculture &amp; Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya to provide training for enhancing the skills of farmers besides imparting updated agricultural technologies to departmental functionaries. Awareness Programmes/ trainings conducted periodically.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **Pattern of Assistance:**


- Conduct trainings and awareness programmes.

children.text: The “Integrated Agriculture Training Centre (IATC) Scheme” was launched by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya to provide training for enhancing the skills of farmers besides imparting updated agricultural technologies to departmental functionaries. Awareness Programmes/ trainings conducted periodically.
To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the bonafide farmers can approach the nearest Agriculture Development Officer of a Community Development Block/Agriculture Circle.
The bonafide farmers shall be selected on a first come first serve basis.
District Agriculture Officers of the concerned districts
Sub-Divisional Agricultural Officers of the concerned sub-divisions
Agricultural Development Officers of the concerned Community and Rural Development Blocks

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Application Process:**

To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the bonafide farmers can approach the nearest Agriculture Development Officer of a Community Development Block/Agriculture Circle.
> **Mode of Selection of Beneficiary(s):**

The bonafide farmers shall be selected on a first come first serve basis.
> **Whom to Contact:**


   1. District Agriculture Officers of the concerned districts
   1. Sub-Divisional Agricultural Officers of the concerned sub-divisions
   1. District Training Officers, Tura/Shillong
   1. Agricultural Development Officers of the concerned Community and Rural Development Blocks

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
- The applicant should be a permanent resident of Meghalaya.
- The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.

children.text: The applicant should be a permanent resident of Meghalaya.
The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.
